data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Self-check passed. CLAUDE.md updated with: (1) blast-radius scoring description in Named-agent dispatch paragraph for dso:complexity-evaluator, (2) new brainstorm SC alignment gate paragraph (artifact contradiction detection), (3) new implementation-plan bidirectional TDD paragraph (file impact table, modify-existing-test RED tasks). No stale descriptions remain. Scope: CLAUDE.md only, as required by adversarial review finding.
